## How to Extract

1. **Download** all `.zip` and `.z01`, `.z02`... files
2. **Extract** using [7-Zip](https://www.7-zip.org/) or [WinRAR](https://www.rarlab.com/)
3. Open the `.zip` file - all parts will combine automatically
